title: cordylostigma microcala
intro: Cordylostigma microcala, also known as the Cordylostigma plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its potential health benefits. The Cordylostigma plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its medicinal properties. Cordylostigma microcala is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and wounds, due to its potential health benefits.
